title: Talking Transports: MPC Container Ships Bets on Feeder Fleets
title_cn: 谈论运输：MPC 集装箱船押注于支线船队
summary: While investors focus on the large containership order book, the feeder market tells a different story. In this Talking Transports podcast, MPC Container Ships Co-CEO & CFO Moritz Fuhrmann joins Bloomberg Intelligence’s senior transportation and logistics analyst Lee Klaskow to discuss why limited new-vessel supply, an aging feeder fleet, and growing intra-regional trade support a constructive long-term outlook. Fuhrmann explains how MPCC has transformed its fleet through modern, fuel-effici

summary: US drillers are letting production rise again — just not the way they used to.

title: Stocks Rise as Rebound in Chipmakers Gathers Pace: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着芯片制造商加速反弹，股市上涨：市场总结
summary: Dip buyers extended a rebound in chipmakers, lifting global stock markets. Brent topped $90 a barrel as the US and Iran exchanged strikes for a 10th straight day.

title: Victoria Debt Deal Faces Opposition From HSBC Bank
title_cn: 维多利亚债务交易面临汇丰银行的反对
summary: UK carpet maker Victoria Plc.’s bid to restructure its balance sheet is facing resistance from HSBC Holdings Plc, a holder of the company’s bonds.

title: The Great British Takeover Tops $60 Billion After Mitie Deal
title_cn: Mitie 交易完成后，英国收购金额突破 600 亿美元
summary: The UK stock market is losing the equivalent of more than $2 billion a week to takeovers of London-listed companies, with Mitie Group Plc the latest name to be snapped up.

title: Tether’s Three-Way Crypto Deal Is Called Off, Mallers Steps Down
title_cn: Tether 的三向加密交易被取消，Mallers 下台
summary: A proposed merger of three crypto firms has been scrapped, with one of their leaders stepping down and another consolidating power across the Tether-backed franchise.

title: IEA Warns Mideast Hostilities Are Increasing Oil Supply Concerns
title_cn: 国际能源署警告中东敌对行动加剧石油供应担忧
summary: The International Energy Agency said it’s “closely monitoring the situation in oil markets” as escalating hostilities in the Middle East increase the concerns over security of supplies.

title: Kazakhstan to Stop Piping Oil to Black Sea After Tanker Attacks
title_cn: 油轮遇袭后哈萨克斯坦将停止向黑海输送石油
summary: Kazakhstan is set to stop piping crude to a port on Russia’s Black Sea coast after a spate of attacks on tankers that’s jeopardizing the landlocked Asian country’s ability to produce oil.

title: Carlyle in Talks to Hand ESG Consulting Firm Over to Bridgepoint
title_cn: 凯雷正在洽谈将 ESG 咨询公司移交给 Bridgepoint
summary: Carlyle Group Inc. is in talks to hand the keys of sustainability consultancy Anthesis Group over to its private credit lender Bridgepoint Group Plc, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: US-Based Axiom Seeks Hong Kong IPO to Tap China’s Biotech Boom
title_cn: 总部位于美国的 Axiom 寻求在香港首次公开募股，以利用中国生物技术的繁荣
summary: Axiom Biosciences is considering an initial public offering in Hong Kong, a rare move for an American biotechnology firm, and one that would help it tap China’s booming clinical development capabilities.

title: SBI Funds Rises 6.2% in Trading Debut After $1 Billion India IPO
title_cn: SBI 基金在印度首次公开募股 10 亿美元后首日上涨 6.2%
summary: SBI Funds Management Ltd. shares rose 6.2% in their Mumbai debut Tuesday after investors piled into the company’s $1 billion initial public offering, making it one of India’s most heavily subscribed billion-dollar share sales.

title: Emerging Market Assets Rally on China Tech Support, Iran Talks
title_cn: 新兴市场资产因中国技术支持和伊朗谈判而上涨
summary: Emerging market stocks rebounded after three days of losses after China mounted a state-sponsored rescue program for its tech shares.

title: Singapore Leads Record Foreign Investments in Southeast Asia
title_cn: 新加坡在东南亚的外国投资创历史新高
summary: Southeast Asia is a “strategic winner” from supply chain shifts and capital reallocation, highlighting the region’s resilience, according to United Overseas Bank Ltd..

title: The New Insider Traders Lurking on Prediction Markets
title_cn: 潜伏在预测市场的新内幕交易者
summary: Sites like Polymarket can be rewarding for traders with inside info. There are different ways to get it.

title: London Stock Exchange to Introduce Nonstop Trading Next Year
title_cn: 伦敦证券交易所将于明年推出不间断交易
summary: The London Stock Exchange will open a new venue outside of its regular market hours, a move to offer “near-continuous trading” and better compete with the 24/7 trading offered by alternative platforms.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 21
title_cn: 7 月 21 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Brent oil swung after rallying more than 20% this month, as traders weighed threats to maritime traffic from the Strait of Hormuz and the Red Sea to a key Kazakh export terminal on Russia’s coast.

title: World Hunger Eases for Third Year But War and El Niño Pose Risks
title_cn: 世界饥饿连续第三年缓解，但战争和厄尔尼诺现象构成风险
summary: Global hunger is in retreat, but the Middle East conflict and El Niño weather phenomenon pose new threats, according to United Nations agencies.

title: Danantara Hires Banks for Planned Second Dollar Bond Sale
title_cn: Danantara 聘请银行进行第二次美元债券发行计划
summary: Indonesia’s sovereign wealth fund Danantara has mandated banks to sound out investor demand for a potential sale of long-dated dollar bonds, weeks after completing its first offshore debt offering.

title: Zalando Avoids Fine as German Regulator Ends Disclosure Probe
title_cn: 德国监管机构结束信息披露调查，Zalando 避免罚款
summary: Germany’s financial regulator concluded a review into Zalando SE over a missing disclosure in its annual report without imposing a fine.

title: Goldman Says Brent Could Top $120 If Hormuz Disruptions Persist
title_cn: 高盛表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡中断持续，布伦特原油价格可能突破 120 美元
summary: Brent could rally to more than $120 a barrel by the fourth quarter if disruptions of the Strait of Hormuz persist, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc., although that’s not the bank’s base case.

title: Millikin University Sweetens Bond Deal by Adding 600-Bed Student Apartments
title_cn: 米利金大学增设 600 个床位的学生公寓，让债券交易更加甜蜜
summary: A private college in Illinois is sweetening its upcoming bond deal by adding a student apartment complex to increase investor protections.

title: BlackRock-MGX Consortium Eyes $5 Billion Aligned Data Centers Expansion
title_cn: BlackRock-MGX 联盟计划耗资 50 亿美元进行数据中心扩建
summary: A consortium including BlackRock Inc.’s Global Infrastructure Partners and Abu Dhabi’s MGX plans to invest $5 billion to boost growth at Aligned Data Centers.

title: Data Centers on Track to Suck Up a Fifth of US Power Use by 2035
title_cn: 到 2035 年，数据中心有望吸收美国五分之一的用电量
summary: Data centers in the US will account for about 20% of the nation’s electricity consumption in 2035, up from 5.9% today, according to BloombergNEF.

title: Dating Apps Face Scam Challenge of AI-Powered ‘Chatfishing’
title_cn: 约会应用程序面临人工智能驱动的“聊天钓鱼”诈骗挑战
summary: Dating-app companies won’t touch the problem, or don’t know how.

title: Burnham Appoints First AI Minister to Cabinet in Tech Reshuffle
title_cn: 伯纳姆在技术洗牌中任命首位人工智能部长进入内阁
summary: Britain’s new Prime Minister Andy Burnham has appointed Kanishka Narayan as minister for artificial intelligence, making the post a cabinet-level position for the first time.

title: Won Daily Trading Volume Jumps on Extended Hours, Stock Selloff
title_cn: 韩元每日交易量因延长交易时间而猛增，股票抛售
summary: Daily trading volume in the South Korean won has picked up since 24-hour trading began two weeks ago, a trend driven by foreigners offloading local chipmakers’ shares.

title: Andreessen Horowitz Hires Army Vet to American Dynamism Team
title_cn: 安德森霍洛维茨聘请陆军退伍军人加入美国活力团队
summary: Giant venture capital firm Andreessen Horowitz has hired defense and space technology investor Connor Love, adding a military veteran and prominent VC to a team focused on startups critical to US interests.

title: TSMC to Hike Chip Prices by Up to 10% in 2027, Nikkei Says
title_cn: 日经新闻称台积电将于 2027 年将芯片价格提高最多 10%
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. has held discussions with clients about chipmaking price increases of as much as 10% in 2027 to cover the rising cost of manufacturing, the Nikkei reported, citing people with knowledge of the matter.

title: BlackRock, Hillhouse, Temasek Said Set to Back Innolight Listing
title_cn: 贝莱德、高瓴资本、淡马锡表示将支持旭创科技上市
summary: BlackRock Inc., Hillhouse Investment and Temasek Holdings Pte are set to be among cornerstone investors in the potential $8 billion listing by Zhongji Innolight Co. in Hong Kong, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Samsung Hires Ex-Boston Dynamics Executive in Robotics Push
title_cn: 三星聘请波士顿动力公司前高管推动机器人技术发展
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. has hired one of South Korea’s leading robotics executives from Hyundai Motor Group to oversee a new robotics division, escalating competition in a sector emerging as the next battleground among global technology companies.

title: UBS Trading Desk Says Buy Momentum Stocks as Selloff Nears End
title_cn: 瑞银交易部门表示，随着抛售接近尾声，买入动量股
summary: The sharp selloff in momentum stocks may be nearing its end, creating an opportunity for investors to start rebuilding positions in artificial intelligence and semiconductor shares, according to UBS’ trading desk.

title: China AI Sensation Moonshot’s Gamble on Big Models Pays Off
title_cn: 中国AI Sensation Moonshot对大模型的赌博获得了回报
summary: Crowds rushed to an obscure corner of China’s premier tech summit, moving past monumental booths from Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and Tencent Holdings Ltd. to catch a glimpse of the hottest name in domestic AI.

title: NEXTDC Shares Jump After Data Center Operator Wins New Contracts
title_cn: 数据中心运营商赢得新合同后 NEXTDC 股价上涨
summary: NEXTDC Ltd. shares advanced after the Brisbane-based data-center operator said it had won new customer contracts, bolstering its contracted utilization by 11% in the three months to June.

title: China’s GigaAI Seeks 2026 Hong Kong IPO in First for World Model
title_cn: 中国GigaAI寻求2026年香港IPO，成为世界典范
summary: Jijia Vision is in discussions to hold an initial public offering on Hong Kong’s stock exchange as soon as this year, joining a flurry of Chinese AI firms planning public market debuts.

title: South Korea’s Early Exports Jump to July Record on AI-Led Gains
title_cn: 人工智能带动的增长，韩国 7 月份早期出口跃升至历史新高
summary: South Korea’s exports extended robust growth in early July as artificial intelligence-driven demand for semiconductors continued to fuel the economy.

title: Oracle Credit Risk Hits Near 18-Year High on AI Debt Load Angst
title_cn: 由于人工智能债务负担焦虑，甲骨文信用风险触及近 18 年来的高点
summary: The cost of protecting Oracle Corp.’s debt against default reached a fresh multi-year high on Monday while its existing bonds sold off, as doubts grew over whether the company’s massive investments in artificial intelligence will pay off.

title: BlackRock’s Meta Deal to Show the Power of $25 Billion M&A Spree
title_cn: 贝莱德的 Meta 交易展现了 250 亿美元并购热潮的力量
summary: For Larry Fink, BlackRock Inc.’s more than $12 billion debt sale for a Meta Platforms Inc. data center is the result of years spent transforming a public investments giant into a heavy hitter in private markets too.

title: Snap Nears Settlement of Addiction Case Ahead of Jury Trial
title_cn: Snap 成瘾案即将在陪审团审判前达成和解
summary: Snap Inc. said it has reached a tentative agreement to settle the second case set for trial over claims that the world’s largest social media platforms are addictive to minors, leaving only Meta Platforms Inc. to face a jury starting next week in Los Angeles.

title: Paytm’s Profit Rises After Turnaround Boosts Bottom Line
title_cn: Paytm 扭亏为盈后利润上升
summary: Paytm reported a 79% rise in net profit, reflecting cost cuts as well as growth across its payments and financial services businesses.

title: Alibaba Fined Record €550 Million by EU for Illegal Sales
title_cn: 阿里巴巴因非法销售被欧盟处以创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元罚款
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd.’s e-commerce service was fined €550 million ($629 million) by the European Union for selling illegal products in the largest penalty under the bloc’s content moderation rulebook.

title: Google Shares Gain on Report of Chip to Boost AI Efficiency
title_cn: 谷歌股价因芯片提升人工智能效率的报告而上涨
summary: Shares of Google owner Alphabet Inc. gained on a report that the company is developing a server chip designed to optimize its Gemini artificial intelligence model.

title: Thames Water Announces Hosepipe Ban After Record Heat Waves
title_cn: 泰晤士水务公司在创纪录的热浪后宣布禁止使用软管
summary: Troubled Thames Water is introducing a temporary hosepipe ban for customers living in and around London, following three record-breaking heat waves this summer.

title: Darline Graham Running for Senate as Trump Seeks to Put Mark on Congress
title_cn: 特朗普寻求在国会留下印记，达林·格雷厄姆竞选参议员
summary: Lindsey Graham’s sister Darline Graham is running to replace him at Trump’s urging.

title: Hungary Prosecutors Seize Orban Party’s Servers, His Ally Says
title_cn: 欧尔班党的盟友称，匈牙利检察官扣押了他的服务器
summary: Prosecution investigators seized e-mail and communication servers of the opposition Fidesz party of Viktor Orban, the former prime minister’s spokesperson was quoted as saying.

title: China Slams Japan Defense Chief Over Defiance of Nuclear ‘Taboo’
title_cn: 中国谴责日本防卫长官无视核“禁忌”
summary: China criticized Japan’s defense minister for calling for more rigorous debate over Tokyo’s nuclear-weapons policy, a stance that Beijing sees as threatening regional peace and stability.

title: US-Iran Strikes Extend to 10th Day as Houthis Threaten Ships
title_cn: 胡塞武装威胁船只，美伊袭击延长至第十天
summary: The US and Iran exchanged strikes for a 10th consecutive day even as mediators sought to revive a truce, while the Houthi militant group in Yemen threatened shipping in the Red Sea.

title: Poland Pushes Ahead With 3% Digital Tax Plan Despite US Threats
title_cn: 尽管美国威胁，波兰仍推进 3% 的数字税计划
summary: The Polish government is moving ahead with a plan to put a 3% levy on digital companies such as Alphabet Inc.’s Google, Meta Platforms Inc. or Alibaba Group Holding Ltd., despite threats of retaliation from the US.

title: Burnham’s Rebel UK Cabinet Sends a Tricky Message
title_cn: 伯纳姆的反叛英国内阁发出了一个棘手的信息
summary: The new UK prime minister’s allies insist the appointments represent all factions and regions.

title: Israel Withdraws Troops From Parts of Lebanon in Test of Truce
title_cn: 以色列从黎巴嫩部分地区撤军以测试停战
summary: Israeli troops have withdrawn from parts of southern Lebanon under a US-mediated ceasefire agreement, which aims to keep Iran-backed Hezbollah away from the Israeli border and end nearly five months of hostilities.

title: Trump’s Election Demands Get Test in Key Arizona Primary Races
title_cn: 特朗普的选举要求在亚利桑那州的主要初选中得到考验
summary: President Donald Trump wants GOP lawmakers to back his plan to scrutinize the November midterm elections, echoing unfounded complaints he still makes about his 2020 defeat. Arizona’s primaries on Tuesday are the first test of whether that message is energizing Republican voters.

title: Sewing Praises Merz’s Recent Reforms After Previous Frustration
title_cn: Sewing 赞扬 Merz 在经历了之前的挫折后最近的改革
summary: Deutsche Bank AG Chief Executive Officer Christian Sewing hailed reform plans unveiled recently by German Chancellor Friedrich Merz as a step forward for the country after a perceived unsatisfactory performance from the government before that.

title: Houthis Warn All Ships Against Calling at Saudi Arabia’s Ports
title_cn: 胡塞武装警告所有船只不要停靠沙特阿拉伯港口
summary: A message from Yemen’s Houthi rebels to shipowners warned all vessels against calling at Saudi Arabian ports, shedding light on the scope of a threat that puts millions of barrels of exports from the kingdom at risk.

title: Hacker Breaches South Korean Database of Nearly All Diplomats
title_cn: 黑客入侵了韩国几乎所有外交官的数据库
summary: South Korea has been hit by a “significant” data leak that could affect all of its diplomats following a breach at a government-run training academy.

title: India Protesters Press On as Parliament Adjourns
title_cn: 印度抗议者在议会休会时继续施压
summary: Pressure is mounting on Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s government a day after police used tear gas and batons to block thousands of protesters from marching on parliament, causing dozens of injuries on both sides.

title: New Regulator Declares War on Fake Food in Richest Indian State
title_cn: 新监管机构向印度最富有的邦假冒食品宣战
summary: In the two months since Tukaram Mundhe took charge as head of the food and drug regulator in India’s richest state, his teams have seized adulterated milk packets, suspended licenses of blood banks, raided illicit chewing tobacco makers, and temporarily shut two of Mumbai’s well-known food outlets. The crackdown may only be the beginning.

title: Takaichi’s Popularity Dips After Prioritizing Controversial Laws
title_cn: 在优先考虑有争议的法律后，高市的受欢迎程度下降
summary: Approval ratings for Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi dropped in the latest polls as she pushed ahead with some divisive bills despite voters’ concerns about the cost of living.

title: Burnham Cuts Energy Bills Tax in First Cost-of-Living Help
title_cn: 伯纳姆首次削减能源账单税以帮助生活费用
summary: The UK will scrap a 5% tax on energy bills starting from October, new Prime Minister Andy Burnham announced, the first of several policies expected to offer households more “breathing space” with the cost of living.

title: Burnham’s Pricey Pledges Leave Question of How to Fund Them
title_cn: 伯纳姆的昂贵承诺留下了如何为其提供资金的问题
summary: Addressing the nation as its new prime minister on Monday, Andy Burnham pledged his first action would be to give people “breathing space” with the cost of living. But a growing list of expensive promises means he too could struggle to pay the bills.

title: Thames Water Senior Creditors Pitch Golden Share for Government
title_cn: 泰晤士水务高级债权人为政府提供黄金股份
summary: Thames Water’s senior creditors are proposing to give the UK government more public control of the utility as they seek to avoid new Prime Minister Andy Burnham placing it into special administration.

title: Taiwan to Slow Mobile Internet Disruptions to Simulate War, Natural Disasters
title_cn: 台湾将减缓移动互联网中断以模拟战争和自然灾害
summary: Taiwan will simulate disruptions to mobile internet services for the first time, as the island steps up preparations for scenarios ranging from natural disasters to a potential conflict with China.

title: UK Borrowing Overshoots in Warning to New Burnham Government
title_cn: 英国借贷超支向新伯纳姆政府发出警告
summary: Britain borrowed more than forecast in the first three months of the fiscal year, a reminder to new Chancellor of the Exchequer John Healey of the challenges he faces to keep the public finances on track.
